Fields.Name: LOD 0-1 Boundry Distance
Fields.Description: Switching center

Fields.Name: LOD 0-1 Play Distance
Fields.Description: play at the center of the boundary

Fields.Name: LOD 1-2 Boundry Distance
Fields.Description: Switching center

Fields.Name: LOD 1-2 Play Distance
Fields.Description: play at the center of the boundary

Fields.Name: LOD 2-3 Boundry Distance
Fields.Description: Switching center

Fields.Name: LOD 2-3 Play Distance
Fields.Description: play at the center of the boundary

Fields.Name: LOD 3-4 Boundry Distance
Fields.Description: Switching center

Fields.Name: LOD 3-4 Play Distance
Fields.Description: play at the center of the boundary

Fields.Name: LOD 4-5 Boundry Distance
Fields.Description: Switching center

Fields.Name: LOD 4-5 Play Distance
Fields.Description: play at the center of the boundary

Fields.Name: LOD 5-6 Boundry Distance
Fields.Description: Switching center

Fields.Name: LOD 5-6 Play Distance
Fields.Description: play at the center of the boundary

Fields.Name: Texture Switch - LOD 0-1 Boundry Distance
Fields.Description: Texture switching center (Texure LOD disabled at 0)

Fields.Name: Texture Switch - LOD 0-1 Play Distance
Fields.Description: Texture Play around the boundary

Fields.Name: Enable Crossfade
Fields.Description: Is crossfade enabled (0: disabled, 1: enabled)?

Fields.Name: No FarClip
Fields.Description: Disables far clipping and always draws at the deepest depth in clip space. Mainly for the skyboxes

Fields.Name: Follow Camera on XZ Plane
Fields.Description: Follow the camera on the XZ plane (GR SEQ09242)

Fields.Name: Is Celestial Sphere Draw Phase
Fields.Description: Set the drawing phase to the celestial sphere (GR SEQ09242)

Fields.Name: Draw - Max Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum drawing distance. In the open, it will be used for the activation distance

Fields.Name: Draw - Fade Range
Fields.Description: Fade distance from the maximum drawing distance to the actual disappearance

Fields.Name: Shadow Draw - Max Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum shadow drawing distance

Fields.Name: Shadow Draw - Fade Range
Fields.Description: Fade distance from the maximum shadow drawing distance to the actual disappearance

Fields.Name: Motion Blur - Max Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which motion blur is enabled

Fields.Name: Is Point Light Shadow Source
Fields.Description: Cast the shadow of a point light source

Fields.Name: Is Directional Light Shadow Source
Fields.Description: Cast the shadow of a parallel light source

Fields.Name: Is Shadow Destination
Fields.Description: Receive a shadow

Fields.Name: Is Shadow Only
Fields.Description: Shadow drawing only

Fields.Name: Drawn by Reflection Camera
Fields.Description: Reflected

Fields.Name: Drawn only by Reflection Camera
Fields.Description: Reflection drawing only

Fields.Name: LoD Map Level
Fields.Description: The level of LoD map to draw from

Fields.Name: LoD Type
Fields.Description: LoD target type and size

Fields.Name: Distant LOD - Boundry Distance
Fields.Description: Distance switching distance [m]

Fields.Name: Distant LOD - Play Distance
Fields.Description: Distant view switching play distance [m]

Fields.Name: Open-world - Minimum Boundry Distance
Fields.Description: Construction limit distance for open [m]. If the distance to the camera is less than this distance in the open, it will not be built. This is a function for distant view assets. -1: Function disabled (default)

Fields.Name: Open-world - Minimum Play Distance
Fields.Description: Open construction limit play distance [m]

Fields.Name: Z Sort Offset for No Far Clip Draw
Fields.Description: If the distance from the camera is the same in the same drawing phase, the smaller translucent system is drawn in the foreground, and the opaque system is drawn in the larger value. The base point of the offset is the origin in the celestial sphere drawing phase. Other than that, it is mainly Model AABB. (GR SEQ09242)

Fields.Name: Shadow Draw Alpha Test Distance
Fields.Description: Distance to perform alpha test when drawing shadow [m]

Fields.Name: Shadow Draw LOD Offset
Fields.Description: LOD level offset value when drawing shadows

Fields.Name: Load Balancer - Draw Distance Scale Param ID
Fields.Description: Load balancer drawing distance scale parameter ID
